chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No. S – 113 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.534/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.859/2023 (Stay) 04.03.2024 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shahani, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Learned Counsel for applicants, by filing statement dated 26.02.2024, has sought withdrawal of this revision application by referring to a compromise between applicant No.1 and respondent No.1, without a prejudice to any interest of the government available in this matter. This revision application, therefore, is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
